section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a patient-reported symptom rather than an exam or objective finding, so it belongs in the history rather than the findings section.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient is allergic to percocet, vicodin, and regulun.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Allergies are typically documented in a separate allergies or objective data section; placing them in HPI is acceptable but slightly disorganized relative to the defined section semantics.
Height is an objective vital/measurement and more appropriately belongs in the findings section rather than the symptom-focused HPI.
